prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次依次约1880→1595→1536→1739→1781名，整体呈先升后降再小幅回升的波动走势；2025年基准位次约1781名，近两年位次 在1739–1781区间窄幅震荡，显示该校在贵州理科考生中的竞争热度趋于稳定；2021–2025年理科/物理类招生计划分别为89→85→88→93→93人，2025年持平于93人；2026年物理类计划大幅增至133人，较2025年扩招约43%，是近六年最大幅度扩招，显著增加了录取机会。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中 国大学排名2026年第33名（2021年第31→2022年第30→2023年第28→2024年第31→2025年第33），稳居全国前35强，属于电子信息领域顶尖高校；2026年高考周期声 誉评价为偏负面（2起事件涉及学校管理与师德师风），但整体关注度有限；抖音热度排名第33位（较热），视频数27条、综合热度约134万，在同类高校中曝光度中等偏上；2022 年曾出现断档关注信号，但近年未再出现明显投档异常；第五轮学科评估中，信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、仪器科学与技术A- 、光学工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A类学科，电子信息与计算机领域学科实力全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年高热推荐，计算机类持续推荐；电气工程及其自动化高热推荐；本省2026年考生总数约29.9万，较2025年（约29.7万）微增，物理类考生按历史占比估算约20.8万，竞争基数略有 扩大；电子科技大学位于四川成都，与贵州相邻，属西南地区核心城市，对贵州考生有较强的地域吸引力和就业辐射优势；该校在贵州招生占比约1.5%–2%，属中等偏下比例，扩招后占比将明显提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1781名、2026年大幅扩招43%至133人（显著增加录取名额） 、学校层次稳居全国前列、电子信息类学科A+级顶尖实力、专业热度持续高热、本省考生总数微增等多重因素：扩招是最大利好，但学校高层次的吸引力与学科优势会吸引更多高 分考生竞争，部分抵消扩招效应。预测2026年物理类最低位次约2211名，区间1879–2543名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类大幅扩招至133人，预测最低位次约2211名，区间1879–2543名。位次在区间下限1879名以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（微电子、集成电路、计算机类）；位次在190 0–2300名区间建议以二档电子信息类为主力，搭配一档专业冲刺；位次在2300–2543名区间建议以三档专业保底，争取二档专业。整体策略：冲一档、稳二档、保三档。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 1880 → 1595 → 1536 → 1739 → 1781, showing a trend of first rising, then falling, and then slightly rebounding; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1781, with rankings in the past two years fluctuating narrowly between 1739 and 1781, indicating that the competition heat for this university among Guizhou science students has stabilized; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Science/Physics Category were 89 → 85 → 88 → 93 → 93, with 2025 remaining at 93; in 2026, the Physics Category plan significantly increases to 133, an expansion of about 43% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in the past six years, significantly increasing admission opportunities.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (2021: 31st → 2022: 30th → 2023: 28th → 2024: 31st → 2025: 33rd), firmly in the top 35 nationally, a top university in the field of electronic information; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative (2 incidents involving university management and teacher ethics), but overall attention is limited; Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with 27 videos and a comprehensive popularity of about 1.34 million, with medium to high exposure among similar universities; a signal of attention gap appeared in 2022, but no obvious admission anomalies have occurred in recent years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Instrument Science and Technology A-, Optical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 6 A-class disciplines, with top national strength in electronic information and computer fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended in 2024, Computer majors are continuously recommended; Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended; the total number of candidates in this province in 2026 is about 299,000, a slight increase from about 297,000 in 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 208,000 based on historical proportion, the competition base has slightly expanded; the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, adjacent to Guizhou, a core city in the Southwest region, with strong regional attraction and employment radiation advantages for Guizhou candidates; the proportion of enrollment in Guizhou is about 1.5%–2%, a medium to low proportion, which will significantly increase after expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1781, the significant 43% expansion in 2026 to 133 (significantly increasing admission slots), the university's stable top national level, A+ top strength in electronic information disciplines, continuously high major popularity, and a slight increase in the number of candidates in the province, among multiple factors: expansion is the biggest positive, but the university's high-level appeal and disciplinary advantages will attract more high-scoring candidates to compete, partially offsetting the expansion effect. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 2211, with a range of 1879–2543.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category significantly expands to 133, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 2211, range 1879–2543. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 1879 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Microelectronics, Integrated Circuits, Computer Category); candidates with rankings in the 1900–2300 range are advised to mainly target Tier 2 Electronic Information Category, with sprint attempts for Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings in the 2300–2543 range are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while striving for Tier 2 majors. Overall strategy: sprint for Tier 1, stabilize with Tier 2, and secure with Tier 3.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1211 → 1088 → 1038 → 1370 → 1257, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1257, with fluctuations in the 1257–1370 range in the past two years, indicating relatively stable competition intensity; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for liberal arts/history category were 6 → 6 → 4 → 6 → 5, with 5 in 2025; the 2026 history category plan remains 5, unchanged from 2025, maintaining a stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, firmly among the top in the country, but the university is known for its strengths in science and engineering, with liberal arts majors not being its traditional advantage; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative (2 incidents), but overall attention is limited; Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure; no obvious abnormal signals in admissions; all A-class disciplines are in science and engineering (electronics, communications, computer science, etc.), with no liberal arts disciplines entering the A-class rating, indicating generally average academic strength in liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The history category only offers majors in Social Science Experimental Class (Public Management and Law Compound Talent Cultivation) and Foreign Languages and Literature, which are not currently high-demand majors; the total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is about 299,000, with history category examinees estimated at about 90,600 based on historical proportions, roughly the same as 2025 (about 90,100); the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, adjacent to Guizhou, offering some regional appeal to Guizhou examinees, but liberal arts majors are not the university's core strength, limiting the regional advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1257, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged (5), the university's high level but non-advantageous liberal arts majors, basically stable examinee numbers, and average popularity of liberal arts majors: both the plan and examinee scale show no significant changes, with the competition pattern largely continuing. The predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 history category is about 1267, with a range of 1077–1457.

Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 1077 can aim for the Social Science Experimental Class; those in the 1100–1300 range have opportunities for both majors, with the Social Science Experimental Class recommended as the primary choice; candidates with rankings above 1300 are advised to use Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety option. With only 2 majors available, choices are limited, so it is recommended to decide based on personal interests and career plans.
